user.title: E.ON Energy
user.description:
Paste your Auth0 refresh token below.

How to get it:
1. Log in to www.eonenergy.com in Chrome/Firefox
2. Open DevTools → Network tab (F12)
3. Filter requests by **/oauth/token**
4. Find the POST to auth.eonenergy.com — click it
5. Open the **Response** tab
6. Copy the **refresh_token** value (long string starting with the provider prefix)

The integration will use this token to fetch new access tokens automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate E.ON Energy
reauth_confirm.description:
Your E.ON Energy session has expired. Paste a new refresh token.

Log in to www.eonenergy.com, open DevTools → Network → filter /oauth/token, copy the refresh_token from the POST response.

error.invalid_auth: The refresh token was rejected. Make sure you copied the full refresh_token value from the /oauth/token response.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the E.ON Energy service. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: E.ON Energy account is already configured.
